Pandas Data Analysis: The pandas library provides DataFrame and Series objects for efficient tabular data manipulation in Python. Core operations include filtering rows, selecting columns, grouping and aggregating, merging datasets, and handling missing values with fillna or dropna. This tutorial demonstrates a full EDA (exploratory data analysis) workflow on a sample sales dataset, from loading CSV files to generating summary statistics and visualizations with matplotlib. Performance tips for large datasets include using categorical dtypes, chunked reads, and vectorized operations instead of apply loops.
